hooks.command: file="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$file" in */scripts/validation/*.py) echo '[PIPELINE REMINDER] You edited a validation file. Check if reference/spirit-guide/VALIDATION-THRESHOLDS.md and reference/PIPELINE.md need updating.' ;; */scripts/evolve.py|*/scripts/spike_runner.py|*/scripts/strategy_engine.py|*/scripts/report.py|*/scripts/data.py|*/.github/workflows/spike.yml|*/.claude/skills/spike.md|*/.claude/skills/spike-results.md) echo '[PIPELINE REMINDER] You edited a pipeline file. Check if reference/PIPELINE.md needs updating.' ;; esac; exit 0
